data.name: Dominated by: My Bully's Daughter
data.detailed_description:
21 Years after graduating from the university where you were bullied relentlessly, you get fired from your job. After living on the streets for weeks, you're attacked by the woman who tormented you back in university, except...it's not her, but actually her daughter that looks exactly like her.

After you tell the sadistic mother and daughter duo that you're currently homeless, they invite you to stay with them, but it soon becomes obvious that they both have their own sadistic and sexual plans for you.

Both Sana and her MILFY mother mercilessly tease you with their bodies and waste no time in hiding the fact that they want to use you to "pleasure" themselves

This game is part 1 in the series. This game focuses on your relationship with Sana and your history with Sanada and her friends 21 years ago

  • ~9K words

  • 2 Endings

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 40 Unique character images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

  • The game is mostly a kinetic novel with a few dialogue options, one of which changes the ending you're going to get

data.short_description: After being homeless for a few weeks, you encounter your sadistic bully 21 years after escaping from her. She invites you to stay with her and her daughter, but it soon becomes obvious that they have sinister intentions
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
